overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character riding a horse along a cliffside trail overlooking a river canyon and railway trestle bridge. The character pauses at a scenic overlook to view a waterfall before continuing along the path toward the railway tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested cliffside trail with canyon view

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail cut into the cliffside, navigating through dense pine forest with a wooden railway trestle bridge visible ahead across the canyon

entered.detail: large wooden railway bridge spanning the canyon with multiple support trusses
deep rocky canyon with a river flowing through the bottom
steep reddish-brown rock wall rising beside the trail
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
narrow unpaved path winding along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a narrow dirt trail hugging the cliffside, surrounded by dense pine forest on the left and a steep drop to the river canyon on the right. Ahead, a massive wooden railway trestle bridge spans the canyon, visible through breaks in the trees as the horse moves steadily forward.

events.description: character stops horse at the edge of a rocky overlook
sun emerges from behind clouds, brightly illuminating the waterfall and canyon

agents.ego_description: stopped at the scenic overlook, sitting on horseback while panning the camera to take in the view of the waterfall and surrounding canyon landscape

entered.detail: white cascading waterfall plunging into the river below
exposed rocky outcrop providing panoramic views of the canyon
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a rocky overlook, revealing a breathtaking view of a waterfall cascading into the canyon below. As the sun breaks through the clouds, the landscape brightens dramatically, showing the railway bridge now off to the left and distant mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail parallel to railway trestle

events.description: character resumes riding along the cliffside trail
approaching railway tracks, ground surface transitions to gravel alongside the rails

agents.ego_description: riding along the cliff edge parallel to the railway trestle bridge, eventually approaching and riding alongside the railway tracks on the right

entered.detail: wooden railway ties and steel rails running parallel to the trail
sparse trees and shrubs on the hillside across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character resumes riding along the cliff edge, now with the massive railway trestle bridge dominating the right side of the frame. The trail runs parallel to the railway tracks, which come into view as the character approaches, riding over gravel and dirt toward the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a cliffside trail that transitions from a secluded forest path into a wide, sunlit vista dominated by industrial railway architecture. It begins with the character riding through a dense pine forest on a narrow dirt trail, where a massive wooden railway trestle bridge is glimpsed through the trees. As the horse reaches a rocky overlook, the camera pauses to reveal a cascading waterfall and distant mountains while the lighting shifts dramatically as the sun breaks through the clouds. The scene then opens up as the character resumes their ride, with the landscape expanding to place the towering railway bridge prominently on the right. Finally, the trail turns toward the railway tracks, moving over gravel and dirt as the camera approaches the massive bridge structure.
